diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: export { Hono }, export types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, InferRequestType, InferResponseType, ClientRequestOptions)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (class import)
+- Imports or neighbors: './hono', './types', './context', './request', './client'
+- Plain-English summary: Top-level re-export entry point for the Hono web framework, routing types and core classes.
+- Copy-safe detail: Exports one Hono class and ten type re-exports from submodules.
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: export types (Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input, Schema, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface)
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, HonoRequest, various utility types (IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, etc.)
+- Imports or neighbors: './context', './hono-base', './utils/types', './utils/headers', './utils/http-status'
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for environment, routing, handlers, and interface unions that drive the framework.
+- Copy-safe detail: Contains ~280 type exports grouped in four sections (Values, Routes, Handlers, Interfaces).
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: export class Hono
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase (import/extend), RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: './hono-base', './router/reg-exp-router', './router/smart-router', './router/trie-router', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: Entry point Hono class that extends HonoBase, initializes router, and sets up default config.
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, simple constructor that wires options and default SmartRouter with RegExp/Trie fallbacks.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: class Hono (alias as HonoBase), exports get/post/put/delete/options/patch/on/use methods on prototype
+- Internal names noticed: compose, Context, Router, Env types, H, MergePath, MiddlewareHandler, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath utilities
+- Imports or neighbors: './compose', './context', './router', './types', './utils/constants', './utils/url'
+- Plain-English summary: Base framework implementation with route registration, method dispatchers, middleware, error handling, and request dispatching.
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, contains router wiring, handler chaining, path merging, mount support, fetch/request/fire methods.
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: class Context, type alias Renderer, types for set/get var, Layout, HTMLRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, BodyRespond, NewResponse, Redirect
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, Result, Env, Input types, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ResponseHeader, StatusCode, TEXT_PLAIN, createResponseInstance
+- Imports or neighbors: './request', './router', './types', './utils/html', './utils/http-status', './utils/mime', './utils/types'
+- Plain-English summary: Request context that wires request to response, manages variables, headers, status, layout rendering, response helpers.
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, class with private fields, accessor methods for req/event/res/var, response helper factories, notFound handler wiring.
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: class HonoRequest, cloneRawRequest function
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol, Result type, Input types, ValidationTargets, parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, decodeURIComponent, getQueryParam
+- Imports or neighbors: './http-exception', './request/constants', './router', './types', './utils/body', './utils/headers', './utils/url'
+- Plain-English summary: Parses incoming Request, exposes path/query/header/param/body methods, caches body to enable cloning, returns validated data.
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, extracts URL params/queries/headers, parses body, returns match result, caches body for later retrieval.
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol
+- Internal names noticed: none
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export used as property name to expose match result on HonoRequest.
+- Copy-safe detail: One-line file, one unique symbol, no dependencies or functions.
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions types
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest, BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, parseFormData, convertFormDataToBodyData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: '../request'
+- Plain-English summary: Parses form-data or urlencoded body based on Content-Type, flattens or nests keys via all/dot options, returns typed object.
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, checks content type, routes to parseFormData or empty object, recursively builds nested object for dot notation, handles arrays.
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function
+- Internal names noticed: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, dispatch, index, isError, handler
+- Imports or neighbors: './context', './types'
+- Plain-English summary: Koa-style middlewares composer, dispatches handlers in array until finalized or error caught, wraps next() calls in async functions.
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, returns closure with `index` state, `dispatch` function called with i=0, throws if next called twice, routes error/notFound to onError/onNotFound, sets context.res if result exists.
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode, HTTPExceptionOptions (res, message, cause)
+- Imports or neighbors: './utils/http-status'
+- Plain-English summary: Extends Error to carry status code and optional Response, provides getResponse to materialize the response from throw or stored instance.
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, stores status/res at constructor, getResponse merges res.headers or creates new Response from message/status.
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, parseResponse, DetailedError types
+- Internal names noticed: client, utils, type
